category_sources: source_facts.description says Generate function prototypes for functions in input files; official cproto page describes generating C function prototypes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cproto; official cproto page title uses CPROTO/cproto.
docs_sources: Official Invisible Island cproto page has a Documentation section linking the cproto program manpage; manpage is hosted on the same official domain.
repo_sources: Thomas Dickey's cproto-snapshots GitHub repository describes itself as snapshots of releases and links to invisible-island.net/cproto/cproto.html; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official manpage describe generating C function prototypes and declarations from C source files.
